label: Strategy Performance
description: Filterable strategy table grouped by asset class with real-time P&L, status, and mode indicators.
knownIssues: OverviewData interface has no error field — L0.8 relies on WidgetErrorBoundary for render errors and data-unavailable state for fetch failures. Adding a proper error field requires modifying overview-data-context.tsx.
overview-data-context.tsx imports PnLBreakdown/TimeSeriesPoint type-only from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data — minor hygiene; these are type-only imports and do not cause runtime mock data leakage.
Pause/Resume action buttons in table rows call e.stopPropagation() but have no action handler wired — functional gap for L4.1.
findings: L1.7 finding: use-overview-page-data.ts (the data assembly hook) imports runtime values from lib/mocks (CLIENTS, ORGANIZATIONS, SEED_SERVICES, getAlertsForScope, getStrategiesForScope, getAggregatedPnlForScope) as mock fallbacks behind isMockDataMode() guard. This is acceptable data-mode gating, not a hard violation, but should be migrated to lib/constants/ or lib/fixtures/ as part of the broader mock-to-fixture migration.
